baseline.source: mission-control control-plane benchmark, full daily-log materialization path
baseline.measurementMethod: Average wall-clock time across 5 runs using the legacy daily-log path that builds full per-day markdown content and keeps file materialization enabled

result.source: mission-control control-plane benchmark, read-only context-pack daily-log summary path
result.measurementMethod: Average wall-clock time across 5 runs using the summary-only daily-log path with file materialization disabled and lightweight first-entry previews for the memory layer

environment.note: A follow-up phase benchmark showed the full context-pack load-data phase dropping to about 70.16ms on average after the read-only daily-log summary path replaced the legacy materialized path.
